title: Eerie - The Horror Soundpack
description: A horror soundpack for any horror modpack!
body:
**This soundpack I created.. just because.**

**I wanted to diversify the sounds of the caves, they were always creepy and... special. But they're few and far between, so why not diversify them yourself?**

**So I did it!**

### There are 48 new spooky sounds waiting for you.
- 26 ambients
- 16 noises
- 6 voices

**All new sounds complement the old ones without replacing them, so you'll have a new experience without losing vanilla feel!**

**And so, from the interesting.. soundpack should work correctly on any version of minecraft starting from 1.13**
## If the soundpack doesn't work on your version, I'll tell you what you should do.

Open "eerie" pack with RAR(or what you use) - open file "pack.mcmeta" with notepad(or what you use) - then change "pack format" number:

# Numbers for versions:
- Minecraft 1.13: 2
- Minecraft 1.14 - 1.16: 3
- Minecraft 1.17: 4
- Minecraft 1.18: 5
- Minecraft 1.19 - 1.19.3: 9
- Higher versions will use parameter 9 or higher

# Any new versions? Updates?
**I don't know :)**

### And also, most importantly, a big thank to the users of freesound.org (and a couple of YouTube channels). All honors go to them:
